notes: Primary path uses crop shares from inputs/02-05_espac_lci_coefficients.yml and partitions from inputs/03-05_dfe_factors.yml; indexed molecule columns are optional fallback.
Needs indexed transport type and tkm columns.

rule: Extra emissions / trace placeholders in template
notes: These are used only if precomputed values exist in the table.
Mass columns are needed to populate PP/PE/PET/LDPE/Kraft/Cardboard exchanges.
Legacy rule converts liters to MJ using a fixed factor when unit is L.
Compost/digestate use alias matching; manure placeholders depend on type.
Crop type is inferred from Custom_classification_3, falling back to Category.
Uses Yield_kgha for meanValue and inserts Area_ha into generalComment text.
